ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-25-2018 Off Calendar

Application For Separate Judgment
Off Calendar Jan-18-2018 Text Ruling

Plaintiff Michael Schuppenhauers Notice Of Motion And Motion For Default Judgment Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jan-18-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Rod Divelbiss, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Michael Schuppenhauer, who was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by the defaulted defendants Farmatic Inc., a California corporation, or Farmatic Anlagenbau GMBH.
Default was entered against defendant Farmatic Anlagenbau GMBH on October 19, 2017.
Default was entered against defendant Farmatic Inc., a California corporation, on January 8, 2018.
Dismissal as to defendant FFE Solutions GMBH was filed on December 12, 2017.
Order striking defendant Farmatic Inc.'s answer to plaintiff's first amended complaint was filed on January 8, 2018.
Farmatic Inc.'s cross-complaint was dismissed on January 8, 2018.
DOE defendant were dismissed on December 12, 2017.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Michael Schuppenhauer and against the Defaulted Defendants Farmatic Inc., a California corporation, and Farmatic Anlagenbau GMBH, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $284,469.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $49,827.91.
Statutory payment for the delayed payment - $10,032.00.
Attorney Fees - $58,222.52.
Costs - $4,268.82, for a total judgment in the amount of $406,820.25.

Proposed Findings of Fact, Conclusions of Law and Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-10-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The tentative ruling is adopted. CROSS-DEFENDANT MICHAEL SCHUPPENHAUER'S DEMURRER TO CROSS-COMPLAINT is Off calendar. The motion was advanced and heard on January 8, 2018 per the ex parte order filed December 26, 2017. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Not reported.

Off Calendar Jan-08-2018 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Rod Divelbiss, Esq. of JRA Law Partners LLP, T:415.788.4646, for plaintiff/cross defendant;
No other appearance.

RULING: There being no objection, the Court adopts the tentative ruling. Plaintiff And Cross-Defendant Michael Schuppenhauer's Demurrer To Farmatic, Inc.'s Cross-Complaint, as to the second cause of action is off calendar in light of the ruling on Mr. Schuppenhauer's motion to dismiss Farmatic's cross-complaint. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Not reported.
